zh.lifeSummary: 當Bernard DE COMMINGES於1090年出生在法國米迪-列內斯可明格斯時，他的父親Comte Roger III de Comminges31歲，母親Serena De Foix25歲。他於大約1120年與dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan在法國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他埋葬在法國奧其坦尼豪-加洛沙吉波特藍德-德-可明格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bernard DE COMMINGES于1090年出生在法国米迪-列內斯可明格斯时，他的父亲Comte Roger III de Comminges31岁，母亲Serena De Foix25岁。他于大约1120年与dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan在法国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他埋葬在法国奧其坦尼豪-加洛沙吉波特藍德-德-可明格斯。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: COMMINGES
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Cummings
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of Cumming , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

en.lifeSummary: When Bernard DE COMMINGES was born in 1090, in Comminges, Midi-Pyrénées, France, his father, Comte Roger III de Comminges, was 31 and his mother, Serena De Foix, was 25. He married dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan about 1120, in France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He was buried in Saint-Bertrand-de-Comminges, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bernard DE COMMINGES est né en 1090, à Comminges, Midi-Pyrénées, France, son père, Comte Roger III de Comminges, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Serena De Foix, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan environ 1120, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Ilenterré à Saint-Bertrand-de-Comminges, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bernard DE COMMINGES 1090 in Comminges, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Comte Roger III de Comminges 31 und seine Mutter Serena De Foix 25. Er hat um 1120 in Frankreich dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er wurde in Saint-Bertrand-de-Comminges, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard DE COMMINGES è nato il nel 1090 nel Comminges, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, il suo padre, Comte Roger III de Comminges, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Serena De Foix, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan circa 1120, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Fu sepolto a Saint-Bertrand-de-Comminges, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Bernard DE COMMINGESが1090年にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスコンミンジェズで生まれた時，父Comte Roger III de Commingesは31歳，母Serena De Foixは25歳であった。約1120年にフランスでdame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はフランスオクシタニーハウテ-ガーオンサイント-バートランド-デ-コンミンジェズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernard DE COMMINGES(이)가 1090년 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 코밍스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte Roger III de Comminges(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Serena De Foix(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1120년 프랑스에서 dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 프랑스 옥시탠이 하테-가니 세인트-버트랜드-데-코밍스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard DE COMMINGES nasceu em 1090, em Comminges, Midi-Pyrénées, França, seu pai, Comte Roger III de Comminges, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Serena De Foix, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan aproximadamente 1120, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele foi sepultado em Saint-Bertrand-de-Comminges, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bernard DE COMMINGES родился в 1090 г. в местности коммингесь, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte Roger III de Comminges было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Serena De Foix, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan около 1120 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он был похоронен в местности сеинт-биртранд-де-коммингесь, хауте-гаронн, окситани, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bernard DE COMMINGES nació en 1090, en Comminges, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, su papá, Comte Roger III de Comminges, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Serena De Foix, tenía 25 años. Se casó con dame Diaz de Muret dame de Samatan aproximadamente 1120, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Fue sepultado en Saint-Bertrand-de-Comminges, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia.
